summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Step 4 Analysis UI for Create Valuation flow. All 12 requested features verified working with 100% pass rate.
passed_tests: Step 4 shows loading animation initially when analyzing - 'Analyzing Your Company' text with animated progress bar that grows to 90% over 2.5s - VERIFIED
Valuation Range Card displays Low/Base/High values in currency format ($X.XM or $XK) - Tested with $7.4M base case and $1.5M base case - VERIFIED
Multiple range shown (e.g., 5.9x - 8.9x ARR) with 'Base: X.Xx ARR' note - VERIFIED
ARR used is displayed with 'Derived from MRR' note when MRR input is used - Shows '$1000K' with badge 'Derived from MRR' - VERIFIED
Confidence Card shows High/Medium/Low with colored badge - emerald-100 for High, blue-100 for Medium, amber-100 for Low - VERIFIED
Confidence bar animates to show confidence score - motion.div animates from 0 to calculated percentage - VERIFIED
Missing inputs section appears when confidence is not High - Shows 'Churn rate', 'Customer concentration', 'Profitability (EBITDA/SDE)', 'GRR' - VERIFIED
Key Drivers list shows drivers with impact values (e.g., '+1.5x', '+0.7x', '+0.5x', '+0.3x') in emerald-50/emerald-700 badges - VERIFIED
Red Flags list shows risks with impact values (e.g., '-0.5x', 'Multiple at risk') in amber-50/amber-700 badges - Tested with low NRR, slow growth, low margin - VERIFIED
What to Improve section shows actionable items with potential uplift (e.g., 'Potential: +0.5x to +1.0x') - Shows 4 items in grid layout - VERIFIED
Generate Report button is primary CTA - Blue bg-[#0B4DBB] with shadow, positioned on right side - VERIFIED
Edit Inputs button navigates back to Step 2 - Outline variant, navigates to Financial Metrics step with data preserved - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: computeValuation() correctly calculates: baseMultiple with adjustments from metrics/qualitative, lowMultiple=base*0.8, highMultiple=base*1.2
Confidence scoring properly counts 10+ factors: ARR(+2), growth(+1), grossMargin(+1), nrr(+1), grr(+1), logoChurn(+1), concentration(+1), profitability(+1), founder_dep(+0.5), sales_pred(+0.5)
MRR to ARR conversion works correctly: isFromMRR flag triggers 'Derived from MRR' badge display
Missing inputs logic correctly identifies: Churn rate, Customer concentration, Profitability (EBITDA/SDE), GRR, NRR when not provided
Drivers/risks sorted and limited: drivers.slice(0,5), risks.slice(0,3), improvements.slice(0,4) prevents UI overflow
formatCurrency() function properly formats: >=1M shows $X.XM, >=1K shows $XK, else shows $X
All data-testid attributes implemented: btn-generate-report, btn-edit-inputs for Step 4 CTAs
Loading state animation uses framer-motion with scale/opacity keyframes over 2s repeat cycle
Results appear after 2.5s setTimeout - appropriate UX for perceived analysis processing
seed_data_creation: Created test user, session, and project for Step 4 Analysis testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 4 Analysis UI fully functional. Loading state shows 'Analyzing Your Company' with animated progress bar for 2.5s. Results show: Valuation Range Card (blue gradient) with Low/Base/High values, Multiple Used range, ARR used with 'Derived from MRR' badge if applicable. Confidence Card shows High/Medium/Low badge with animated bar, missing inputs when not High. Key Drivers shows positive factors with +X.Xx impact badges. Red Flags shows risk factors with -X.Xx impact badges (appears only when risks exist). What to Improve shows actionable items with 'Potential: +X.Xx' uplift values. CTAs: 'Generate Report' (primary blue, calls submitValuation API) and 'Edit Inputs' (outline, navigates to Step 2). Key test selectors: btn-generate-report, btn-edit-inputs. Route: /valuation/new/{projectId}
